race.comment: This mainly revolves around the resuming SUPER CHOICE (9) for the Waterhouse & Bott yard. He hasn't been since in some 10 months but ran very well on debut at Seymour, showing customary speed and sticking on well for third. He looks to have trialled nicely and gets every hope from the low gate. WYANDRA (10) is the fitter horse on the scene, third up here having ran well enough for 2nd (in a field of 4) at Cranbourne last time. He'll be fitter again and the stronger tempo should suit. SHALAAKEI (7) is a gelding by Shalaa on debut for the Hayes yard with a lot of trial/jumpout experience, respect any moves. SIRVALDANE (8) was better second up here and has each-way claims with more to offer.
